pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh which copies the Muncie project from the HEC-RAS installation to this path.
Verified against setup_task.sh which explicitly creates this directory for outputs.
Verified against verifier.py which checks this exact path for the expected CSV output and columns.
Verified against verifier.py which checks this exact path for the expected Python script.
Verified against setup_task.sh which executes an inline script to compute and save ground truth metrics to this path, and against verifier.py which uses it to evaluate accuracy.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard Muncie example dataset provided by USACE with the HEC-RAS installation. The environment is initialized by copying the Muncie project files to '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie'. A background script computes the true metrics (peak WSE, duration above threshold) from the unsteady flow HDF simulation output and saves them securely to '/var/lib/hec_ras/ground_truth.json'. The verifier uses this hidden ground truth file to evaluate the agent's expected output CSV at '/home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/flood_duration.csv'.
